test-method.name: tc20_01_nameRejectsSpecialChars
test-method.description: Name field: rejects special characters

test-method.name: tc20_02_nameRejectsDigits
test-method.description: Name field: rejects digits

test-method.name: tc20_03_nameMaxLength
test-method.description: Name field: max length 100 characters

test-method.name: tc20_04_nameAcceptsEmpty
test-method.description: Name field: accepts empty/null (optional field)

test-method.name: tc20_05_addressRejectsSpecialChars
test-method.description: Address field: rejects special characters

test-method.name: tc20_06_addressMaxLength
test-method.description: Address field: max length 100 characters

test-method.name: tc20_07_addressAcceptsEmpty
test-method.description: Address field: accepts empty value

test-method.name: tc20_08_fittingNoDigitsOnly
test-method.description: Fitting No field: accepts digits only

test-method.name: tc20_09_fittingNoRejectsLetters
test-method.description: Fitting No field: rejects letters

test-method.name: tc20_10_fittingNoAcceptsEmpty
test-method.description: Fitting No field: accepts empty value

test-method.name: tc20_11_orderNoAcceptsSpecialChars
test-method.description: Order No field: accepts special characters

test-method.name: tc20_12_orderNoAcceptsEmpty
test-method.description: Order No field: accepts empty value

test-method.name: tc20_13_serviceNoDigitsOnly
test-method.description: Service No field: accepts digits only

test-method.name: tc20_14_serviceNoMaxLength
test-method.description: Service No field: max length 20 characters

test-method.name: tc20_15_builderIdAlphanumeric
test-method.description: Builder After Care Id: accepts alphanumeric

test-method.name: tc20_16_builderIdAcceptsEmpty
test-method.description: Builder After Care Id: accepts empty value

test-method.name: tc20_17_phoneAcceptsInternationalFormat
test-method.description: Phone field: accepts international format +353 871234567

test-method.name: tc20_18_phoneAcceptsLocalDigits
test-method.description: Phone field: accepts local digits only

test-method.name: tc20_19_phoneAcceptsEmpty
test-method.description: Phone field: accepts empty value

test-method.name: tc20_20_emailAcceptsValidFormat
test-method.description: Email field: accepts valid email format

test-method.name: tc20_21_emailFieldType
test-method.description: Email field: type attribute is email

test-method.name: tc20_22_emailAcceptsEmpty
test-method.description: Email field: accepts empty value

test-method.name: tc20_23_quoteIdAlphanumeric
test-method.description: Quote Number field: accepts alphanumeric

test-method.name: tc20_24_quoteIdAcceptsEmpty
test-method.description: Quote Number field: accepts empty value
